gaps.snippet: impl ClassRegistry { # [doc = " An empty registry — resolves nothing until classes are registered."] # [must_use] pub fn new () -> Self { ClassRegistry { classes : BTreeSet :: new () , } } # [doc = " The registry seeded with the v0 built-in classes (`BUILTIN_CLASSES`)."] # [must_use] pub fn with_builtins () -> Self { ClassRegistry { classes : BUILTIN_CLASSES . iter () . map (| s | (* s) . to_owned ()) . collect () , } } # [doc = " Register a downstream error class. Returns `true` if newly added. Extension is still"] # [doc = " known-set membership — never an `eval` path (X1)."] pub fn register (& mut self , name : impl Into < String >) -> bool { self . classes . insert (name . into ()) } # [doc = " Whether `name` is a known class."] # [must_use] pub fn contains (& self , name : & str) -> bool { self . classes . contains (name) } # [doc = " Resolve a name to a [`ClassName`] **through the registry** — the only way to obtain one.
